# Vježba 7:  Izračun sila hidrostatskog tlaka na zakrivljene plohe

## Fizikalni uvod: Simetrija i sile na cilindar

Kada analiziramo hidrostatske sile na zakrivljene plohe, susrećemo se s izazovom jer vektori tlaka neprestano mijenjaju smjer, ostajući uvijek okomiti na površinu. Zato u inženjerskoj praksi primjenjujemo metodu dekompozicije sile na njezinu **horizontalnu ($F_H$) i vertikalnu ($F_V$) komponentu**.

Ovaj pristup nam omogućuje da složen radijalni profil tlaka svedemo na proračun sila na vertikalnu projekciju i težinu stupca tekućine (stvarnog ili zamišljenog).

### Ključni fizikalni principi:

1.  **Horizontalna simetrija:** Kod potpuno uronjenih cilindričnih tijela, horizontalne sile s lijeve i desne strane se često poništavaju ako se tijelo nalazi na istoj dubini. U tom slučaju, rezultantna horizontalna sila $\sum F_H$ iznosi nula, što značajno pojednostavljuje statičku analizu konstrukcije.
2.  **Vertikalna ravnoteža i uzgon:** Donja polovica cilindra uvijek se nalazi na većoj dubini od gornje, što znači da je tlak odozdo prema gore veći od tlaka odozgo prema dolje. Rezultantna vertikalna sila koja djeluje na tijelo naziva se **Arhimedov uzgon**. 
3.  **Hvatište sile:** Za razliku od ravnih ploha, rezultantna sila na kružnu ili cilindričnu plohu zbog simetrije uvijek mora prolaziti kroz **centar zakrivljenosti** plohe.

Razumijevanje ove interakcije ključno je za projektiranje brana, podvodnih tunela i spremnika pod tlakom. Interaktivni widget ispod vizualno prikazuje kako se te komponente sila međusobno poništavaju ili zbrajaju ovisno o dubini i geometriji.

```{=html}
<!-- NOVI WIDGET: Simetrija i poništavanje sila na cilindru -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-submerged-sym" style="
    font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 30px auto;
    background: #ffffff;
    border-radius: 20px;
    box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
">
    <!-- Header with Gradient -->
    <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e293b 0%, #334155 100%); padding: 25px 35px; color: white;">
        <h3 style="margin: 0; color: white; border: none; background: none; padding: 0; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.025em;">
            Simetrija i poništavanje sila na cilindru
        </h3>
        <p style="margin: 6px 0 0 0; opacity: 0.7; font-size: 0.95rem;">Zašto se horizontalne sile poništavaju kod uronjenih tijela?</p>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 0;">
        <!-- Controls Section -->
        <div style="padding: 25px; background: #f8fafc; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; order: 2;">
            <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px;">

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Dubina centra (zC)</label>
                        <span id="zc-val-7" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">2.5 m</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="zc-slider-7" min="1.1" max="5.0" value="2.5" step="0.1" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div style="margin-top: 10px; padding: 15px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #94a3b8; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px;">Ukupni uzgon</div>
                    <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;">
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.85rem;">
                            <span style="color: #64748b;">F_U (Uzgon):</span>
                            <span id="fu-res-sym" style="font-weight: 700; color: #10b981;">0.0 kN</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div style="background: #eff6ff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe;">
                    <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #1e40af; line-height: 1.5;">
                        <b>Uoči:</b> Vektori tlaka s lijeve i desne strane su identični na svakoj dubini. Ukupna horizontalna rezultanta je nula. Vertikalno, donji vektori su duži (veći tlak), što rezultira silom prema gore (uzgon).
                    </p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Canvas Area -->
        <div style="padding: 25px; background: white; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; order: 1;">
            <div style="position: relative; width: 100%; height: 380px; background: #fdfdfd; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #f1f5f9; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: inset 0 2px 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.02);">
                <canvas id="canvas-sym-7" width="550" height="380" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
                
                <!-- Legend Overlay -->
                <div style="position: absolute; top: 20px; right: 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); padding: 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); font-size: 0.7rem; color: #334155;">
                    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 4px;">
                        <div style="width: 12px; height: 3px; background: #f59e0b;"></div> Lokalni tlak p
                    </div>
                    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;">
                        <div style="width: 12px; height: 3px; background: #10b981;"></div> Rezultantni uzgon
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-sym-7');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const zcSl = document.getElementById('zc-slider-7');

        function draw() {
            const zc = parseFloat(zcSl.value);
            const R = 1.0; const scale = 50;
            const waterY = 50;
            const cx = canvas.width / 2;
            const cy = waterY + zc * scale;

            document.getElementById('zc-val-7').textContent = zc.toFixed(1) + ' m';

            ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // Water
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.1)'; ctx.fillRect(0, waterY, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#3b82f6'; ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, waterY); ctx.lineTo(canvas.width, waterY); ctx.stroke();

            // Cilindar
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e293b'; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
            ctx.arc(cx, cy, R * scale, 0, Math.PI*2);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.4)'; ctx.fill();

            // Vektori tlaka (Radial)
            for(let a = 0; a < 360; a += 15) {
                const rad = a * Math.PI / 180;
                const localZ = Math.sin(rad) * R;
                const globalZ = zc + localZ;
                const pLen = (globalZ * 10) + 15; // visual length

                const xStart = cx + Math.cos(rad) * R * scale;
                const yStart = cy + Math.sin(rad) * R * scale;
                const xEnd = xStart + Math.cos(rad) * pLen;
                const yEnd = yStart + Math.sin(rad) * pLen;

                drawArrow(ctx, xEnd, yEnd, xStart, yStart, '#f59e0b', 2);
            }

            // Resultant Buoyancy (FV)
            const Buoyancy = 1000 * 9.81 * (Math.PI * R*R);
            document.getElementById('fu-res-sym').innerText = (Buoyancy/1000).toFixed(1) + ' kN';
            
            drawArrow(ctx, cx, cy + R*scale + 20, cx, cy - R*scale - 50, '#10b981', 4);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#10b981'; ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`F_U = ${(Buoyancy/1000).toFixed(1)} kN`, cx + 20, cy - R*scale - 30);
        }

        function drawArrow(ctx, fromx, fromy, tox, toy, color, width) {
            const headlen = 8;
            const angle = Math.atan2(toy - fromy, tox - fromx);
            ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = width;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(fromx, fromy); ctx.lineTo(tox, toy); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(tox, toy);
            ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI/6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI/6));
            ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI/6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI/6));
            ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.fill();
        }

        zcSl.oninput = draw;
        draw();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

### Zadatak 1: Cilindar na granici fluida

**Tekst zadatka:** 
Cilindar polumjera $R$ i duljine $b$ postavljen je uz vertikalni zid tako da fluid ispunjava samo lijevu polovicu prostora oko njega. Desna strana i donji dio cilindra su pod atmosferskim tlakom. Potrebno je odrediti horizontalnu i vertikalnu komponentu sile hidrostatskog tlaka, te rezultantu koja prolazi kroz središte cilindra.

**Zadano:**
* $h$ - dubina fluida iznad centra cilindra
* $R$ - polumjer cilindra
* $b$ - duljina cilindra (okomito na sliku)
* $\rho$ - gustoća fluida

```{=html}
<div id="v7-t1-container" class="mf1-widget" style="font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <!-- Glassmorphism Header -->
    <div style="background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); padding: 1.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;">
        <h3 style="margin: 0; color: #1e293b; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700;">🌊 Rezultantna sila na cilindar (Zadatak 1)</h3>
        <div style="display: flex; gap: 0.5rem;">
            <button id="v7-t1-toggle-left" style="padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #3b82f6; background: #eff6ff; color: #1d4ed8; font-size: 0.8rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;">Prikaži V_lijevo</button>
            <button id="v7-t1-toggle-right" style="padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #ef4444; background: #fef2f2; color: #b91c1c; font-size: 0.8rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;">Prikaži V_desno</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 0;">
        <!-- Canvas Area -->
        <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 2rem; position: relative; min-height: 450px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">
            <canvas id="v7-t1-canvas" width="500" height="450" style="max-width: 100%; height: auto;"></canvas>
            
            <!-- Legend Overlay -->
            <div style="position: absolute; bottom: 1rem; left: 1rem; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); padding: 0.75rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; font-size: 0.75rem;">
                <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;">
                    <div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3); border: 1px solid #3b82f6;"></div>
                    <span>V_dolje (Realni volumen)</span>
                </div>
                <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;">
                    <div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.3); border: 1px solid #ef4444;"></div>
                    <span>V_gore (Imaginarni volumen)</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Controls Area -->
        <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 1.5rem; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.25rem;">
            <div style="padding: 0.95rem 1rem; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.5;">
                <strong>Fizikalni smisao:</strong> Horizontalna komponenta dolazi od vertikalne projekcije cilindra, a vertikalna od težine zamišljenog stupca tekućine iznad zakrivljene plohe. Zato rezultanta prolazi kroz središte cilindra.
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Dubina h [m]: <span id="v7-t1-h-val" style="color: #3b82f6;">2.0</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-t1-h-slider" min="0.5" max="4.0" step="0.1" value="2.0" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Polumjer R [m]: <span id="v7-t1-r-val" style="color: #3b82f6;">1.0</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-t1-r-slider" min="0.3" max="1.5" step="0.1" value="1.0" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Duljina b [m]: <span id="v7-t1-b-val" style="color: #3b82f6;">1.0</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-t1-b-slider" min="0.5" max="3.0" step="0.1" value="1.0" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Gustoća ρ [kg/m³]: <span id="v7-t1-rho-val" style="color: #3b82f6;">1000</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-t1-rho-slider" min="800" max="1200" step="50" value="1000" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <!-- Results -->
            <div style="margin-top: auto; background: #f1f5f9; padding: 1rem; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem;">
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                    <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #475569;">F<sub>H</sub>:</span>
                    <span id="v7-t1-fh-res" style="font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b;">- kN</span>
                </div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                    <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #475569;">F<sub>V</sub>:</span>
                    <span id="v7-t1-fv-res" style="font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b;">- kN</span>
                </div>
                <div style="border-top: 1px solid #cbd5e0; padding-top: 0.5rem; display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                    <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1e293b;">Rezultanta F<sub>R</sub>:</span>
                    <span id="v7-t1-fr-res" style="font-weight: 800; color: #3b82f6;">- kN</span>
                </div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                    <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #475569;">Kut α:</span>
                    <span id="v7-t1-angle-res" style="font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b;">- °</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v7-t1-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    
    const hS = document.getElementById('v7-t1-h-slider');
    const rS = document.getElementById('v7-t1-r-slider');
    const bS = document.getElementById('v7-t1-b-slider');
    const rhoS = document.getElementById('v7-t1-rho-slider');
    
    const btnLeft = document.getElementById('v7-t1-toggle-left');
    const btnRight = document.getElementById('v7-t1-toggle-right');
    
    let showLeft = true;
    let showRight = true;
    
    btnLeft.onclick = () => { showLeft = !showLeft; btnLeft.style.opacity = showLeft ? 1 : 0.5; update(); };
    btnRight.onclick = () => { showRight = !showRight; btnRight.style.opacity = showRight ? 1 : 0.5; update(); };

    function update() {
        const h = parseFloat(hS.value);
        const R = parseFloat(rS.value);
        const b = parseFloat(bS.value);
        const rho = parseFloat(rhoS.value);
        const g = 9.81;

        document.getElementById('v7-t1-h-val').innerText = h.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v7-t1-r-val').innerText = R.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v7-t1-b-val').innerText = b.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v7-t1-rho-val').innerText = rho;

        // Calculations
        // FH acts on vertical projection of left half (2R x b)
        const zc = h + R;
        const FH = rho * g * zc * (2 * R) * b / 1000; // kN
        
        // FV is buoyancy of the left half-cylinder
        const FV = rho * g * (Math.PI * R * R / 2) * b / 1000; // kN
        
        const FR = Math.sqrt(FH*FH + FV*FV);
        const angle = Math.atan2(FV, FH) * 180 / Math.PI;

        document.getElementById('v7-t1-fh-res').innerText = FH.toFixed(2) + ' kN';
        document.getElementById('v7-t1-fv-res').innerText = FV.toFixed(2) + ' kN';
        document.getElementById('v7-t1-fr-res').innerText = FR.toFixed(2) + ' kN';
        document.getElementById('v7-t1-angle-res').innerText = angle.toFixed(1) + '°';

        draw(h, R, FH, FV, FR, angle);
    }

    function draw(h, R, FH, FV, FR, angle) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        
        const scale = 70;
        const cx = canvas.width / 2 + 50;
        const cy = canvas.height / 2 + 50;
        const waterY = cy - (h + R) * scale;
        
        // Water
        const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, waterY, 0, canvas.height);
        grad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(186, 230, 253, 0.4)');
        grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(186, 230, 253, 0.8)');
        ctx.fillStyle = grad;
        ctx.fillRect(0, waterY, cx, canvas.height - waterY);
        
        // Surface line
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#3b82f6';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, waterY); ctx.lineTo(cx, waterY); ctx.stroke();
        
        // Reference points on surface
        ctx.fillStyle = '#1e293b'; ctx.font = 'italic 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('F', 20, waterY - 10);
        ctx.fillText('G', cx/2, waterY - 10);
        ctx.fillText('H', cx - 10, waterY - 10);

        // Hatching logic for FV
        if (showLeft) {
            ctx.save();
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx - R * scale, waterY);
            ctx.lineTo(cx - R * scale, cy);
            ctx.arc(cx, cy, R * scale, Math.PI, 1.5 * Math.PI, false);
            ctx.lineTo(cx, waterY);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();
            // Hatching
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            for(let i = -R*scale; i <= 0; i += 8) {
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx + i, waterY); ctx.lineTo(cx + i, cy - Math.sqrt(R*R*scale*scale - i*i)); ctx.stroke();
            }
            ctx.restore();
        }

        if (showRight) {
            ctx.save();
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx - R * scale, waterY);
            ctx.lineTo(cx - R * scale, cy);
            ctx.arc(cx, cy, R * scale, Math.PI, 0.5 * Math.PI, true);
            ctx.lineTo(cx, waterY);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();
             // Hatching
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.3)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            for(let i = -R*scale; i <= 0; i += 8) {
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx + i, cy + Math.sqrt(R*R*scale*scale - i*i)); ctx.lineTo(cx + i, waterY); ctx.stroke();
            }
            ctx.restore();
        }

        // Zid (Wall)
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#64748b'; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx, 0); ctx.lineTo(cx, canvas.height); ctx.stroke();

        // Cilindar
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(cx, cy, R * scale, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#f1f5f9';
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e293b';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.stroke();

        // Points
        const points = [
            {x: cx, y: cy + R*scale, l: 'A'},
            {x: cx - R*scale, y: cy, l: 'B'},
            {x: cx, y: cy, l: 'C'},
            {x: cx, y: cy - R*scale, l: 'D'},
            {x: cx + R*scale, y: cy, l: 'E'}
        ];
        ctx.fillStyle = '#1e293b'; ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
        points.forEach(p => {
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, 4, 0, 7); ctx.fill();
            ctx.fillText(p.l, p.x + 8, p.y - 8);
        });

        // Force Arrows
        const forceScale = 2;
        // FH at depth h+R
        drawArrow(cx - R*scale - 80, cy, cx - R*scale, cy, '#ef4444', 'FH', 3);
        // FV at center of buoyancy (approx)
        drawArrow(cx - R*scale*0.4, cy + R*scale + 40, cx - R*scale*0.4, cy, '#3b82f6', 'FV', 3);
        // FR from center
        const frRad = angle * Math.PI / 180;
        drawArrow(cx, cy, cx - Math.cos(frRad)*100, cy - Math.sin(frRad)*100, '#8b5cf6', 'FR', 4);
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label, width) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
        if(label) { ctx.font = "bold 14px Inter"; ctx.fillText(label, x1, y1 - 10); }
    }

    [hS, rS, bS, rhoS].forEach(s => s.oninput = update);
    update();
})();
</script>
```

### Widget F: Moment ravnoteže zaklopke

Ovaj widget pokazuje kada se zakrivljena zaklopka počinje otvarati: tlak vode stvara moment otvaranja, a težina zaklopke moment zatvaranja.

```{=html}
<div id="v7-widget-f-container" class="widget-container" style="font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; max-width: 1050px; margin: 2rem auto; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 22px; overflow: hidden;">
    <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f766e 0%, #0ea5e9 100%); padding: 1.5rem 1.75rem; color: white;">
        <h3 style="margin: 0; color: white; border: none; background: none; padding: 0; font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 800;">Moment ravnoteže zaklopke</h3>
        <p style="margin: 0.45rem 0 0 0; opacity: 0.92; font-size: 0.95rem;">Četvrt-kružna zaklopka s hvatištem u vrhu: usporedba momenata vode i težine.</p>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 0;">
        <div style="padding: 1.25rem; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f8fafc 0%, #eff6ff 100%);">
            <canvas id="v7-widget-f-canvas" width="680" height="520" style="width: 100%; height: auto; display: block;"></canvas>
        </div>

        <div style="padding: 1.25rem 1.25rem 1.5rem; background: #ffffff; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem;">
            <div style="padding: 0.95rem 1rem; border-radius: 14px; background: #ecfeff; border: 1px solid #a5f3fc; color: #155e75; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Fizikalni smisao:</strong> Zaklopka se otvara tek kad moment sile vode nadmaši moment vlastite težine. Promatraj gdje djeluju <code>F_H</code>, <code>F_V</code> i <code>G</code>, jer položaj hvatišta jednako je važan kao i sama veličina sile.
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 0.35rem;">Razina vode H: <span id="v7-wf-h-val" style="color: #0891b2;">2.5 m</span></label>
                <input id="v7-wf-h" type="range" min="0" max="5" step="0.1" value="2.5" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 0.35rem;">Polumjer zaklopke R: <span id="v7-wf-r-val" style="color: #0891b2;">1.2 m</span></label>
                <input id="v7-wf-r" type="range" min="0.5" max="2.0" step="0.1" value="1.2" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 0.35rem;">Širina b: <span id="v7-wf-b-val" style="color: #0891b2;">1.0 m</span></label>
                <input id="v7-wf-b" type="range" min="0.5" max="3.0" step="0.1" value="1.0" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 0.35rem;">Masa zaklopke m: <span id="v7-wf-m-val" style="color: #0891b2;">220 kg/m</span></label>
                <input id="v7-wf-m" type="range" min="50" max="600" step="10" value="220" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 1rem; border-radius: 14px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.82rem; margin-bottom: 0.45rem;"><span style="color: #475569;">Horizontalna sila F_H</span><strong id="v7-wf-fh" style="color: #2563eb;">0.0 kN</strong></div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.82rem; margin-bottom: 0.45rem;"><span style="color: #475569;">Vertikalna sila F_V</span><strong id="v7-wf-fv" style="color: #16a34a;">0.0 kN</strong></div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.82rem; margin-bottom: 0.45rem;"><span style="color: #475569;">Težina G</span><strong id="v7-wf-g" style="color: #ef4444;">0.0 kN</strong></div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.82rem; padding-top: 0.45rem; border-top: 1px solid #dbeafe;"><span style="color: #0f172a; font-weight: 700;">Rezultanta F_R</span><strong id="v7-wf-fr" style="color: #0f766e;">0.0 kN</strong></div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 1rem; border-radius: 14px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fed7aa;">
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.82rem; margin-bottom: 0.45rem;"><span style="color: #9a3412;">Moment vode</span><strong id="v7-wf-mw" style="color: #ea580c;">0.0 kNm</strong></div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.82rem; margin-bottom: 0.45rem;"><span style="color: #9a3412;">Moment težine</span><strong id="v7-wf-mg" style="color: #dc2626;">0.0 kNm</strong></div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.82rem; padding-top: 0.45rem; border-top: 1px solid #fdba74;"><span style="color: #7c2d12; font-weight: 700;">Kritična razina</span><strong id="v7-wf-hcrit" style="color: #c2410c;">0.0 m</strong></div>
            </div>

            <div id="v7-wf-status" style="padding: 0.85rem 1rem; border-radius: 14px; font-weight: 800; text-align: center; background: #dcfce7; color: #166534;">
                Zaklopka je zatvorena
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; gap: 0.5rem;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #475569; font-weight: 700;">Ravnoteža momenata</div>
                <div style="height: 16px; border-radius: 999px; background: #e2e8f0; overflow: hidden; position: relative;">
                    <div id="v7-wf-bar-water" style="height: 100%; width: 0%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #38bdf8, #0284c7);"></div>
                </div>
                <div style="height: 16px; border-radius: 999px; background: #e2e8f0; overflow: hidden; position: relative;">
                    <div id="v7-wf-bar-gravity" style="height: 100%; width: 0%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f87171, #dc2626);"></div>
                </div>
                <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b;">Plava traka: moment otvaranja vode. Crvena traka: moment zatvaranja težine.</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('v7-widget-f-canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const hS = document.getElementById('v7-wf-h');
        const rS = document.getElementById('v7-wf-r');
        const bS = document.getElementById('v7-wf-b');
        const mS = document.getElementById('v7-wf-m');
        const rho = 1000;
        const g = 9.81;

        function cpDepth(H, R) {
            return H + 2 * R / 3;
        }

        function centroidX(H, R) {
            const aRect = Math.max(H, 0) * R;
            const aQuarter = Math.PI * R * R / 4;
            const xRect = R / 2;
            const xQuarter = 4 * R / (3 * Math.PI);
            return (aRect * xRect + aQuarter * xQuarter) / Math.max(aRect + aQuarter, 1e-6);
        }

        function momentWater(H, R, b) {
            const FH = rho * g * b * R * (H + R / 2);
            const FV = rho * g * b * (Math.max(H, 0) * R + Math.PI * R * R / 4);
            const zcp = cpDepth(H, R);
            const xfv = centroidX(H, R);
            return FH * zcp + FV * xfv;
        }

        function solveCriticalHeight(R, b, m) {
            const mg = (m * g) * (0.62 * R);
            let lo = 0;
            let hi = 5;
            for (let i = 0; i < 40; i++) {
                const mid = (lo + hi) / 2;
                if (momentWater(mid, R, b) > mg) hi = mid;
                else lo = mid;
            }
            return (lo + hi) / 2;
        }

        function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, width, label) {
            const head = 10;
            const ang = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
            ctx.strokeStyle = color;
            ctx.fillStyle = color;
            ctx.lineWidth = width;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
            ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(ang - Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(ang - Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(ang + Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(ang + Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();
            if (label) {
                ctx.font = 'bold 15px Inter';
                ctx.fillText(label, x2 + 8, y2 - 6);
            }
        }

        function update() {
            const H = parseFloat(hS.value);
            const R = parseFloat(rS.value);
            const b = parseFloat(bS.value);
            const m = parseFloat(mS.value);

            const FH = rho * g * b * R * (H + R / 2);
            const FV = rho * g * b * (Math.max(H, 0) * R + Math.PI * R * R / 4);
            const FR = Math.sqrt(FH * FH + FV * FV);
            const G = m * g;
            const zcp = cpDepth(H, R);
            const xfv = centroidX(H, R);
            const xg = 0.62 * R;
            const Mwater = FH * zcp + FV * xfv;
            const Mgravity = G * xg;
            const Hcrit = solveCriticalHeight(R, b, m);
            const openRatio = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (Mwater - Mgravity) / Math.max(Mgravity, 1)));

            document.getElementById('v7-wf-h-val').textContent = H.toFixed(1) + ' m';
            document.getElementById('v7-wf-r-val').textContent = R.toFixed(1) + ' m';
            document.getElementById('v7-wf-b-val').textContent = b.toFixed(1) + ' m';
            document.getElementById('v7-wf-m-val').textContent = m.toFixed(0) + ' kg/m';
            document.getElementById('v7-wf-fh').textContent = (FH / 1000).toFixed(1) + ' kN';
            document.getElementById('v7-wf-fv').textContent = (FV / 1000).toFixed(1) + ' kN';
            document.getElementById('v7-wf-g').textContent = (G / 1000).toFixed(2) + ' kN';
            document.getElementById('v7-wf-fr').textContent = (FR / 1000).toFixed(1) + ' kN';
            document.getElementById('v7-wf-mw').textContent = (Mwater / 1000).toFixed(1) + ' kNm';
            document.getElementById('v7-wf-mg').textContent = (Mgravity / 1000).toFixed(1) + ' kNm';
            document.getElementById('v7-wf-hcrit').textContent = Hcrit.toFixed(2) + ' m';
            document.getElementById('v7-wf-bar-water').style.width = Math.min(100, (Mwater / Math.max(Mgravity, Mwater, 1)) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
            document.getElementById('v7-wf-bar-gravity').style.width = Math.min(100, (Mgravity / Math.max(Mgravity, Mwater, 1)) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';

            const status = document.getElementById('v7-wf-status');
            if (Mwater > Mgravity) {
                status.textContent = 'Zaklopka se otvara';
                status.style.background = '#fee2e2';
                status.style.color = '#b91c1c';
            } else {
                status.textContent = 'Zaklopka je zatvorena';
                status.style.background = '#dcfce7';
                status.style.color = '#166534';
            }

            drawScene(H, R, openRatio, FH, FV, G, zcp, xfv, xg);
        }

        function drawScene(H, R, openRatio, FH, FV, G, zcp, xfv, xg) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            const scale = 120;
            const hingeX = 210;
            const hingeY = 120;
            const waterX = 100;
            const floorY = hingeY + R * scale + 70;
            const waterLevelY = hingeY - H * scale;
            const openAngle = -openRatio * 0.32;

            ctx.fillStyle = '#e0f2fe';
            ctx.fillRect(0, waterLevelY, waterX + 160, floorY - waterLevelY);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#0284c7';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(0, waterLevelY);
            ctx.lineTo(waterX + 160, waterLevelY);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.fillStyle = '#94a3b8';
            ctx.fillRect(0, floorY, canvas.width, canvas.height - floorY);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
            ctx.fillRect(hingeX - 20, hingeY - 20, 22, R * scale + 95);

            ctx.save();
            ctx.translate(hingeX, hingeY);
            ctx.rotate(openAngle);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.lineWidth = 5;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(0, R * scale, R * scale, -Math.PI / 2, 0);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.restore();

            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(hingeX, hingeY, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.font = 'bold 15px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('A', hingeX - 18, hingeY - 12);

            const samples = 6;
            for (let i = 0; i <= samples; i++) {
                const t = i / samples;
                const ang = -Math.PI / 2 + t * (Math.PI / 2) + openAngle;
                const px = hingeX + Math.cos(ang) * R * scale;
                const py = hingeY + R * scale + Math.sin(ang) * R * scale;
                const nx = -Math.cos(ang);
                const ny = -Math.sin(ang);
                const depth = Math.max(0, (hingeY - py) / -scale + H);
                const len = 10 + depth * 9;
                drawArrow(px + nx * len, py + ny * len, px, py, '#38bdf8', 2);
            }

            const yFH = hingeY + zcp * scale;
            drawArrow(hingeX - 130, yFH, hingeX - 20, yFH, '#2563eb', 4, 'F_H');

            const xFV = hingeX + xfv * scale * Math.cos(openAngle);
            const yFV = hingeY + (R * 0.85) * scale;
            drawArrow(xFV, yFV - 110, xFV, yFV, '#16a34a', 4, 'F_V');

            const xG = hingeX + xg * scale * Math.cos(openAngle);
            const yG = hingeY + (R * 0.78) * scale;
            drawArrow(xG, yG - 90, xG, yG, '#ef4444', 4, 'G');

            const frScale = 0.0017;
            const frEndX = hingeX - FH * frScale;
            const frEndY = hingeY + R * scale + FV * frScale * 0.8;
            drawArrow(hingeX + 20, hingeY + R * scale - 10, frEndX, frEndY, '#0f766e', 5, 'F_R');

            ctx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(hingeX, hingeY);
            ctx.lineTo(hingeX, floorY);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
            ctx.font = '13px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('Linija hvatišta', hingeX + 10, hingeY + 28);
            ctx.fillText('H', 26, waterLevelY - 8);
            ctx.fillText('R', hingeX + 45, hingeY + R * scale / 2);
        }

        [hS, rS, bS, mS].forEach(el => el.addEventListener('input', update));
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***


### Zadatak 2: Polu-cilindrični zatvarač (60° luk)

**Tekst zadatka:** 
Zatvarač u obliku kružnog luka (sektora) polumjera $R$ i duljine $B$ nagnut je tako da obuhvaća kut od $2\alpha$ simetrično u odnosu na horizontalu. Fluid se nalazi iznad zatvarača do dubine $H$ (mjereno do središta zatvarača). Potrebno je odrediti komponente sile hidrostatskog tlaka i rezultantu.

**Zadano:**
* $H$ - ukupna dubina do središta zatvarača
* $R$ - polumjer luka
* $B$ - širina zatvarača
* $\alpha$ - polukut luka
* $\rho$ - gustoća fluida

```{=html}
<div id="v7-t2-container" class="mf1-widget" style="font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <!-- Glassmorphism Header -->
    <div style="background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); padding: 1.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;">
        <h3 style="margin: 0; color: #1e293b; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700;">🎡 Nagnuti zatvarač (Zadatak 2)</h3>
        <button id="v7-t2-play" style="padding: 0.5rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 8px; border: none; background: #3b82f6; color: white; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;">
            <span>▶</span> Pusti vodu
        </button>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 0;">
        <!-- Canvas Area -->
        <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 2rem; position: relative; min-height: 450px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">
            <canvas id="v7-t2-canvas" width="500" height="450" style="max-width: 100%; height: auto;"></canvas>
            
            <!-- Dimension Labels Overlay -->
            <div id="v7-t2-dim-label" style="position: absolute; top: 1rem; left: 1rem; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #475569;">
                Visina projekcije: <span style="font-weight: 600; color: #1e293b;">2R sin α</span><br>
                Širina projekcije: <span style="font-weight: 600; color: #1e293b;">R(1 - cos α)</span>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Controls Area -->
        <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 1.5rem; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.1rem;">
            <div style="padding: 0.95rem 1rem; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.5;">
                <strong>Fizikalni smisao:</strong> <code>F_H</code> ovisi o visini vertikalne projekcije luka, dok <code>F_V</code> dobivaš iz razlike volumena iznad zakrivljene plohe. Zato isti luk može imati sličnu projekciju, ali vrlo različit vertikalni doprinos.
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.4rem;">Dubina H [m]: <span id="v7-t2-h-val" style="color: #3b82f6;">3.5</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-t2-h-slider" min="1.0" max="7.0" step="0.1" value="3.5" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.4rem;">Polumjer R [m]: <span id="v7-t2-r-val" style="color: #3b82f6;">0.8</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-t2-r-slider" min="0.5" max="2.0" step="0.1" value="0.8" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.4rem;">Kut α [°]: <span id="v7-t2-a-val" style="color: #3b82f6;">60</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-t2-a-slider" min="30" max="90" step="5" value="60" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.4rem;">Širina B [m]: <span id="v7-t2-b-val" style="color: #3b82f6;">8.0</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-t2-b-slider" min="1.0" max="10.0" step="0.5" value="8.0" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <!-- Results -->
            <div style="margin-top: auto; background: #f8fafc; padding: 1rem; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.6rem;">
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                    <span style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #64748b;">F<sub>H</sub>:</span>
                    <span id="v7-t2-fh-res" style="font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b;">- kN</span>
                </div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                    <span style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #64748b;">F<sub>V</sub>:</span>
                    <span id="v7-t2-fv-res" style="font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b;">- kN</span>
                </div>
                <div style="border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding-top: 0.5rem; display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                    <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b;">Rezultanta F<sub>R</sub>:</span>
                    <span id="v7-t2-fr-res" style="font-weight: 800; color: #3b82f6;">- kN</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v7-t2-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    
    const hS = document.getElementById('v7-t2-h-slider');
    const rS = document.getElementById('v7-t2-r-slider');
    const aS = document.getElementById('v7-t2-a-slider');
    const bS = document.getElementById('v7-t2-b-slider');
    const playBtn = document.getElementById('v7-t2-play');
    
    let isPlaying = false;
    let animationId = null;

    playBtn.onclick = () => {
        if (isPlaying) {
            cancelAnimationFrame(animationId);
            playBtn.innerHTML = '<span>▶</span> Pusti vodu';
        } else {
            if (parseFloat(hS.value) >= parseFloat(hS.max)) hS.value = hS.min;
            animate();
            playBtn.innerHTML = '<span>⏸</span> Pauziraj';
        }
        isPlaying = !isPlaying;
    };

    function animate() {
        let val = parseFloat(hS.value);
        val += 0.02;
        if (val > parseFloat(hS.max)) {
            val = parseFloat(hS.max);
            isPlaying = false;
            playBtn.innerHTML = '<span>▶</span> Pusti vodu';
            hS.value = val;
            update();
            return;
        }
        hS.value = val;
        update();
        animationId = requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    function update() {
        const H = parseFloat(hS.value);
        const R = parseFloat(rS.value);
        const alphaDeg = parseFloat(aS.value);
        const B = parseFloat(bS.value);
        const alpha = alphaDeg * Math.PI / 180;
        const rho = 1000;
        const g = 9.81;

        document.getElementById('v7-t2-h-val').innerText = H.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v7-t2-r-val').innerText = R.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v7-t2-a-val').innerText = alphaDeg;
        document.getElementById('v7-t2-b-val').innerText = B.toFixed(1);

        // FH = rho * g * H * (2 * R * sin(alpha)) * B
        const hp = 2 * R * Math.sin(alpha);
        const FH = rho * g * H * hp * B / 1000;
        
        // FV = rho * g * (V1 - V2) * B
        // V1 = Rectangle H x hp
        // V2 = Segment area = R^2 * (alpha - sin(alpha)*cos(alpha))
        const V1 = H * hp;
        const V2 = R * R * (alpha - Math.sin(alpha) * Math.cos(alpha));
        const FV = rho * g * (V1 - V2) * B / 1000;

        const FR = Math.sqrt(FH*FH + FV*FV);

        document.getElementById('v7-t2-fh-res').innerText = FH.toFixed(2) + ' kN';
        document.getElementById('v7-t2-fv-res').innerText = FV.toFixed(2) + ' kN';
        document.getElementById('v7-t2-fr-res').innerText = FR.toFixed(2) + ' kN';

        draw(H, R, alpha, hp, FH, FV);
    }

    function draw(H, R, alpha, hp, FH, FV) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        const scale = 50;
        const cx = 350;
        const cy = 250;
        const waterY = cy - H * scale;

        // Fluid region above and around
        const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, waterY, 0, canvas.height);
        grad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1)');
        grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3)');
        ctx.fillStyle = grad;
        ctx.fillRect(0, waterY, canvas.width, canvas.height - waterY);

        // Hatched Regions for Vertical Force
        // V1 (Blue Rect)
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2)';
        ctx.fillRect(cx - R*scale, waterY, hp*scale, H*scale);
        
        // V2 (Red Segment - actually subtracted area)
        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(cx, cy);
        ctx.rotate(Math.PI/2);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(0, 0, R * scale, -alpha, alpha);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2)';
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.restore();

        // Water surface
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#3b82f6'; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, waterY); ctx.lineTo(canvas.width, waterY); ctx.stroke();
        
        // Gate (Arc)
        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(cx, cy);
        ctx.rotate(Math.PI/2);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(0, 0, R * scale, -alpha, alpha);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e293b'; ctx.lineWidth = 5;
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.restore();

        // Labels
        const points = [
            {x: cx - Math.sin(alpha)*R*scale, y: cy - Math.cos(alpha)*R*scale, l: 'A'},
            {x: cx, y: cy, l: 'F'},
            {x: cx + Math.sin(alpha)*R*scale, y: cy - Math.cos(alpha)*R*scale, l: 'E'}
        ];
        ctx.fillStyle = '#1e293b'; ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        points.forEach(p => {
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, 3, 0, 7); ctx.fill();
            ctx.fillText(p.l, p.x + 5, p.y - 5);
        });

        // FH Arrow
        drawArrow(cx - R*scale - 100, cy, cx - R*scale, cy, '#ef4444', 'FH', 3);
        // FV Arrow
        drawArrow(cx, cy - 80, cx, cy, '#3b82f6', 'FV', 3);
        // FR Arrow
        const frAngle = Math.atan2(FV, FH);
        drawArrow(cx, cy, cx - Math.cos(frAngle)*120, cy - Math.sin(frAngle)*120, '#8b5cf6', 'FR', 4);
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label, width) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
        if(label) { ctx.font = "bold 13px Inter"; ctx.fillText(label, x1, y1 - 8); }
    }

    [hS, rS, aS, bS].forEach(s => s.oninput = update);
    update();
})();
</script>
```

***


### **Savjeti za studente:**

1.  **Vizualiziraj projekciju:** Za horizontalnu silu uvijek zamisli da gledaš zakrivljenu plohu ravno sprijeda. Ono što vidiš je običan pravokutnik. Silu računaš na taj pravokutnik.
2.  **Smjer vertikalne sile:** Uvijek se zapitaj "Gdje je voda?". Ako je voda "ispod" plohe (kao kod donjeg dijela broda), sila ide gore. Ako voda "leži" na plohi, sila ide dolje.
3.  **Točka hvatišta:** Zapamti, kod valjka ili polukugle sila **mora** proći kroz centar radijusa. Ako ti račun pokaže drugačije, provjeri predznake.
4. **Jedinice:** Gustoća vode $\rho$ je $1000 \text{ kg/m}^3$, a $g$ je obično $9.81 \text{ m/s}^2$. Rezultat ćeš dobiti u Newtonima ($N$), pa ga podijeli s 1000 za kilonewtone ($kN$).

***

### Bonus: Interaktivni istraživač komponenti na kružnom luku

Ovaj widget omogućuje slobodno definiranje potopljenog kružnog luka i analizu nastanka horizontalne i vertikalne komponente sile.

```{=html}
<div id="v7-arc-explorer-widget" style="max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">🎯 Explorer: Komponente na kružnom luku</h4>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 20px;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 500px;">
            <canvas id="v7-arc-canvas" width="550" height="500" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>

            <div style="position: absolute; top: 15px; left: 15px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #cbd5e0;">
                <b>Upute:</b><br>
                • Koristite slidere za promjenu kuta luka<br>
                • Crvena linija = Vertikalna projekcija (Fₕ)<br>
                • Plava linija = Horizontalna projekcija (Fᵥ)
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 16px 18px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 14px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.5;">
                <strong>Fizikalni smisao:</strong> Mijenjanjem početnog i završnog kuta mijenjaš i projekcije luka. Crvena projekcija vodi prema <code>F_H</code>, a plava zona iznad luka prema <code>F_V</code>.
            </div>
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Početni kut: <span id="v7-v-a1" style="color:#2563eb;">0</span>°</label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-a1-slider" min="0" max="360" value="90" style="width: 100%;">

                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Završni kut: <span id="v7-v-a2" style="color:#2563eb;">180</span>°</label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-a2-slider" min="0" max="360" value="180" style="width: 100%;">

                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Dubina vrha h: <span id="v7-v-h" style="color:#2563eb;">1.0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-h-slider" min="0" max="5" step="0.1" value="1" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="background: #2d3748; color: white; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #a0aec0; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 15px;">Izračunate komponente:</div>
                <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;">
                        <span>Horizontalna Fₕ:</span>
                        <b id="v7-res-fh" style="color:#fc8181; font-size: 1.1rem;">--- kN</b>
                    </div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;">
                        <span>Vertikalna Fᵥ:</span>
                        <b id="v7-res-fv" style="color:#63b3ed; font-size: 1.1rem;">--- kN</b>
                    </div>
                    <hr style="border: 0; border-top: 1px solid #4a5568; margin: 5px 0;">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;">
                        <span>Rezultanta Fᵣ:</span>
                        <b id="v7-res-fr" style="color:#f6e05e; font-size: 1.2rem;">--- kN</b>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v7-arc-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const a1S = document.getElementById('v7-a1-slider');
    const a2S = document.getElementById('v7-a2-slider');
    const hS = document.getElementById('v7-h-slider');

    function update() {
        const a1_deg = parseFloat(a1S.value);
        const a2_deg = parseFloat(a2S.value);
        const h = parseFloat(hS.value);
        const R = 1.0; const rho = 1000; const g = 9.81;

        document.getElementById('v7-v-a1').innerText = a1_deg;
        document.getElementById('v7-v-a2').innerText = a2_deg;
        document.getElementById('v7-v-h').innerText = h.toFixed(1);

        const a1 = a1_deg * Math.PI / 180;
        const a2 = a2_deg * Math.PI / 180;

        // Simplified component calculation for explorer
        // In real cases, this depends on integration or volume methods
        // Here we use projection logic for visual feedback
        const y1 = Math.sin(a1) * R;
        const y2 = Math.sin(a2) * R;
        const x1 = Math.cos(a1) * R;
        const x2 = Math.cos(a2) * R;

        const h_proj = Math.abs(y1 - y2);
        const w_proj = Math.abs(x1 - x2);

        const z_mid = h + (2*R - (y1 + y2 + 2*R)/2); // Approx depth
        const FH = rho * g * z_mid * h_proj / 1000;
        const FV = rho * g * (h * w_proj + 0.5 * w_proj * h_proj) / 1000; // Visual approximation
        const FR = Math.sqrt(FH*FH + FV*FV);

        document.getElementById('v7-res-fh').innerText = FH.toFixed(1) + " kN";
        document.getElementById('v7-res-fv').innerText = FV.toFixed(1) + " kN";
        document.getElementById('v7-res-fr').innerText = FR.toFixed(1) + " kN";

        draw(a1, a2, h, R);
    }

    function draw(a1, a2, h, R) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 550, 500);
        const scale = 100;
        const cx = 275, cy = 300;
        const waterY = cy - (h + R) * scale;

        // Water
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(49, 130, 206, 0.15)";
        ctx.fillRect(0, waterY, 550, 500 - waterY);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#3182ce"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, waterY); ctx.lineTo(550, waterY); ctx.stroke();

        // Circle Ghost
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#e2e8f0"; ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, R * scale, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        // Projections
        const x1 = Math.cos(a1) * R * scale;
        const y1 = Math.sin(a1) * R * scale;
        const x2 = Math.cos(a2) * R * scale;
        const y2 = Math.sin(a2) * R * scale;

        // Vertical Projection (Red)
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#fc8181"; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx - R * scale - 20, cy + y1); ctx.lineTo(cx - R * scale - 20, cy + y2); ctx.stroke();

        // Horizontal Projection (Blue)
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#63b3ed"; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx + x1, cy + R * scale + 20); ctx.lineTo(cx + x2, cy + R * scale + 20); ctx.stroke();

        // The Arc
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#2d3748"; ctx.lineWidth = 6;
        ctx.beginPath();
        // Determine sweep direction
        let start = a1, end = a2;
        if (a1 > a2) [start, end] = [a2, a1];
        ctx.arc(cx, cy, R * scale, start, end);
        ctx.stroke();

        // Force Vectors at Center
        drawArrow(cx, cy, cx + 50, cy, "#fc8181", "Fh", 3);
        drawArrow(cx, cy, cx, cy + 50, "#63b3ed", "Fv", 3);
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label, width) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
        if(label) { ctx.font = "bold 12px Arial"; ctx.fillText(label, x2 + 5, y2 + 5); }
    }

    [a1S, a2S, hS].forEach(s => s.oninput = update);
    update();
})();
</script>

```

***

## Dodatni istraživači

U ovom su dijelu interaktivni istraživači koji pomažu u vizualizaciji i dubljem razumijevanju sila na zakrivljene plohe.

### Widget A: Istraživač kružnog luka (Proizvoljni kutovi)

Ovaj istraživač omogućuje precizno definiranje luka pomoću kutova $\alpha_1$ i $\alpha_2$ te vizualizaciju pripadnih projekcija.

```{=html}
<div id="v7-widget-a-container" class="mf1-widget" style="font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3b82f6, #2563eb); padding: 1.5rem; color: white;">
        <h3 style="margin: 0; color: white; border: none; background: none; padding: 0; font-size: 1.5rem;">📐 Istraživač kružnog luka</h3>
        <p style="margin: 0.5rem 0 0 0; opacity: 0.9; font-size: 0.9rem;">Analiza F<sub>H</sub> i F<sub>V</sub> za bilo koji segment kružnice.</p>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 0;">
        <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 1.5rem; position: relative; min-height: 500px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">
            <canvas id="v7-widget-a-canvas" width="550" height="500" style="max-width: 100%; cursor: crosshair;"></canvas>
            
            <div style="position: absolute; bottom: 1rem; right: 1rem; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(5px); padding: 0.75rem; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #475569; pointer-events: none;">
                <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 4px;">
                    <div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; background: #ef4444; border-radius: 2px;"></div>
                    <span>F<sub>H</sub> djeluje na vertikalnu projekciju</span>
                </div>
                <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;">
                    <div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; background: #3b82f6; border-radius: 2px;"></div>
                    <span>F<sub>V</sub> odgovara težini stupca iznad</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="padding: 1.5rem; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: #ffffff; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.25rem;">
            <div style="padding: 0.95rem 1rem; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.5;">
                <strong>Kako čitati widget:</strong> Vertikalna crvena projekcija daje ulaz za <code>F_H</code>, a vodeni volumen iznad luka daje <code>F_V</code>. Kad razvučeš luk, ne rastu nužno obje komponente istim tempom.
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Početni kut α₁: <span id="v7-wa-a1-val" style="color: #3b82f6;">0°</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-wa-a1-slider" min="0" max="360" value="45" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Završni kut α₂: <span id="v7-wa-a2-val" style="color: #3b82f6;">180°</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-wa-a2-slider" min="0" max="360" value="135" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Dubina vrha h [m]: <span id="v7-wa-h-val" style="color: #3b82f6;">1.0</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-wa-h-slider" min="0" max="5" step="0.1" value="1.0" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Polumjer R [m]: <span id="v7-wa-r-val" style="color: #3b82f6;">1.0</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-wa-r-slider" min="0.5" max="2" step="0.1" value="1.0" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="margin-top: auto; background: #f1f5f9; padding: 1.25rem; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
                    <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #64748b;">F<sub>H</sub>:</span>
                    <span id="v7-wa-fh-res" style="font-weight: 700; color: #ef4444;">- kN</span>
                </div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
                    <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #64748b;">F<sub>V</sub>:</span>
                    <span id="v7-wa-fv-res" style="font-weight: 700; color: #3b82f6;">- kN</span>
                </div>
                <div style="border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding-top: 0.5rem; display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                    <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b;">Rezultanta F<sub>R</sub>:</span>
                    <span id="v7-wa-fr-res" style="font-weight: 800; color: #8b5cf6;">- kN</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v7-widget-a-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const a1S = document.getElementById('v7-wa-a1-slider');
    const a2S = document.getElementById('v7-wa-a2-slider');
    const hS = document.getElementById('v7-wa-h-slider');
    const rS = document.getElementById('v7-wa-r-slider');

    function update() {
        const a1 = parseFloat(a1S.value) * Math.PI / 180;
        const a2 = parseFloat(a2S.value) * Math.PI / 180;
        const h = parseFloat(hS.value);
        const R = parseFloat(rS.value);
        const rho = 1000;
        const g = 9.81;

        document.getElementById('v7-wa-a1-val').innerText = a1S.value + '°';
        document.getElementById('v7-wa-a2-val').innerText = a2S.value + '°';
        document.getElementById('v7-wa-h-val').innerText = h.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v7-wa-r-val').innerText = R.toFixed(1);

        const y1 = Math.sin(a1) * R;
        const y2 = Math.sin(a2) * R;
        const x1 = Math.cos(a1) * R;
        const x2 = Math.cos(a2) * R;

        const hp = Math.abs(y1 - y2);
        const wp = Math.abs(x1 - x2);
        
        const zc = h + R - (y1 + y2)/2;
        const FH = rho * g * zc * hp / 1000;
        
        const FV = rho * g * (h * wp + Math.abs(R*R/2 * (a2 - a1 - Math.sin(a2-a1)))) / 1000;
        const FR = Math.sqrt(FH*FH + FV*FV);

        document.getElementById('v7-wa-fh-res').innerText = FH.toFixed(2) + ' kN';
        document.getElementById('v7-wa-fv-res').innerText = FV.toFixed(2) + ' kN';
        document.getElementById('v7-wa-fr-res').innerText = FR.toFixed(2) + ' kN';

        draw(a1, a2, h, R, FH, FV, FR);
    }

    function draw(a1, a2, h, R, FH, FV, FR) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        const scale = 120 / (R > 1 ? R : 1);
        const cx = canvas.width / 2;
        const cy = canvas.height / 2 + 50;
        const waterY = cy - (h + R) * scale;

        const waterGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, waterY, 0, canvas.height);
        waterGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(186, 230, 253, 0.3)');
        waterGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(186, 230, 253, 0.6)');
        ctx.fillStyle = waterGrad;
        ctx.fillRect(0, waterY, canvas.width, canvas.height - waterY);
        
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#3b82f6'; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, waterY); ctx.lineTo(canvas.width, waterY); ctx.stroke();

        ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#e2e8f0';
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, R * scale, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e293b'; ctx.lineWidth = 6;
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.beginPath();
        let start = a1, end = a2;
        if(a1 > a2) [start, end] = [a2, a1];
        ctx.arc(cx, cy, R * scale, start, end);
        ctx.stroke();

        const x1 = Math.cos(a1) * R * scale;
        const y1 = Math.sin(a1) * R * scale;
        const x2 = Math.cos(a2) * R * scale;
        const y2 = Math.sin(a2) * R * scale;

        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.8)'; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath(); 
        ctx.moveTo(cx - R*scale - 30, cy + y1); 
        ctx.lineTo(cx - R*scale - 30, cy + y2); 
        ctx.stroke();
        
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.8)'; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(cx + x1, cy + R*scale + 30);
        ctx.lineTo(cx + x2, cy + R*scale + 30);
        ctx.stroke();

        const fScale = 0.5;
        drawArrow(ctx, cx, cy, cx + FH * fScale, cy, '#ef4444', 'F_H', 3);
        drawArrow(ctx, cx, cy, cx, cy + FV * fScale, '#3b82f6', 'F_V', 3);
        
        const frAngle = Math.atan2(FV, FH);
        drawArrow(ctx, cx, cy, cx + Math.cos(frAngle)*FR*fScale, cy + Math.sin(frAngle)*FR*fScale, '#8b5cf6', 'F_R', 4);
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label, width) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
        if(label) { ctx.font = "bold 12px Inter"; ctx.fillText(label, x2 + 5, y2 + 5); }
    }

    [a1S, a2S, hS, rS].forEach(s => s.oninput = update);
    update();
})();
</script>

### Widget B: Tlačna kutija (Normalni vektori)

Ovaj widget vizualizira kako tlak djeluje okomito na svaki dio zakrivljene plohe i kako ti vektori rastu s dubinom.

```{=html}
<div id="v7-widget-b-container" class="mf1-widget" style="font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0ea5e9, #0284c7); padding: 1.5rem; color: white;">
        <h3 style="margin: 0; color: white; border: none; background: none; padding: 0; font-size: 1.5rem;">📦 Tlačna kutija: Normalni vektori</h3>
        <p style="margin: 0.5rem 0 0 0; opacity: 0.9; font-size: 0.9rem;">Vizualizacija smjera i intenziteta tlaka po površini.</p>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 0;">
        <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 1.5rem; position: relative; min-height: 500px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">
            <canvas id="v7-widget-b-canvas" width="550" height="500" style="max-width: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div id="v7-wb-overlay" style="position: absolute; top: 1rem; left: 1rem; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); padding: 0.5rem; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                Pomakni slider "Vodotaj" za animaciju rasta tlaka.
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="padding: 1.5rem; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: #ffffff; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.25rem;">
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Vodotaj h [m]: <span id="v7-wb-h-val" style="color: #0284c7;">1.0</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-wb-h-slider" min="0" max="4" step="0.1" value="1.0" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Polumjer R [m]: <span id="v7-wb-r-val" style="color: #0284c7;">1.0</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-wb-r-slider" min="0.5" max="2" step="0.1" value="1.0" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div style="margin-top: 1rem;">
                <button id="v7-wb-toggle-proj" style="width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #0284c7; background: #f0f9ff; color: #0284c7; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.2s;">Prikaži komponente vektora</button>
            </div>
            
            <div style="margin-top: auto; background: #f0f9ff; padding: 1.25rem; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #bae6fd;">
                <p style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #0369a1; margin: 0; line-height: 1.4;">
                    <strong>Fizikalni uvid:</strong> Svaki mali vektor tlaka djeluje okomito na plohu. Njihov zbroj po cijeloj površini daje rezultantnu silu F<sub>R</sub>.
                </p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v7-widget-b-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const hS = document.getElementById('v7-wb-h-slider');
    const rS = document.getElementById('v7-wb-r-slider');
    const projBtn = document.getElementById('v7-wb-toggle-proj');

    let showProj = false;
    projBtn.onclick = () => {
        showProj = !showProj;
        projBtn.style.background = showProj ? '#0284c7' : '#f0f9ff';
        projBtn.style.color = showProj ? '#ffffff' : '#0284c7';
        update();
    };

    function update() {
        const h = parseFloat(hS.value);
        const R = parseFloat(rS.value);
        document.getElementById('v7-wb-h-val').innerText = h.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v7-wb-r-val').innerText = R.toFixed(1);
        draw(h, R);
    }

    function draw(h, R) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        const scale = 120;
        const cx = 150;
        const cy = 250;
        const waterY = cy - h * scale;

        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.1)';
        ctx.fillRect(0, waterY, canvas.width, canvas.height - waterY);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#0ea5e9'; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, waterY); ctx.lineTo(canvas.width, waterY); ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e293b'; ctx.lineWidth = 5;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(cx, cy, R * scale, 0, Math.PI/2);
        ctx.stroke();

        for(let a = 0; a <= 90; a += 10) {
            const rad = a * Math.PI / 180;
            const x = cx + Math.cos(rad) * R * scale;
            const y = cy + Math.sin(rad) * R * scale;
            
            const depth = (y - waterY) / scale;
            if(depth < 0) continue;

            const pLen = depth * 40;
            const xEnd = x - Math.cos(rad) * pLen;
            const yEnd = y - Math.sin(rad) * pLen;

            const colorVal = Math.min(200, 50 + depth * 40);
            ctx.strokeStyle = `rgb(2, 132, ${colorVal})`;
            ctx.fillStyle = `rgb(2, 132, ${colorVal})`;
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;

            drawArrow(xEnd, yEnd, x, y, ctx.strokeStyle, null, 2);

            if(showProj) {
                ctx.setLineDash([2, 2]);
                ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(100, 116, 139, 0.5)';
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(xEnd, yEnd); ctx.lineTo(x, yEnd); ctx.stroke();
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(xEnd, yEnd); ctx.lineTo(xEnd, y); ctx.stroke();
                ctx.setLineDash([]);
            }
        }
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label, width) {
        const headlen = 8;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
    }

    hS.oninput = update;
    rS.oninput = update;
    update();
})();
</script>
```

### Widget C: Usporedba (Ravna vs. Zakrivljena ploha)

Ovaj widget pokazuje zašto je horizontalna sila ista za obje plohe, dok se vertikalna sila pojavljuje samo kod zakrivljene plohe.

```{=html}
<div id="v7-widget-c-container" class="mf1-widget" style="font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b, #d97706); padding: 1.5rem; color: white;">
        <h3 style="margin: 0; color: white; border: none; background: none; padding: 0; font-size: 1.5rem;">⚖️ Usporedba: Ravna vs. Zakrivljena</h3>
        <p style="margin: 0.5rem 0 0 0; opacity: 0.9; font-size: 0.9rem;">Ista projekcija, različite ukupne sile.</p>
    </div>

    <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 2rem;">
        <div style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem; padding: 0.95rem 1rem; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fed7aa; border-radius: 14px; color: #9a3412; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.5;">
            <strong>Fizikalni smisao:</strong> Ako su projekcije iste, horizontalna komponenta ostaje ista. Razlika nastaje zato što zakrivljena ploha nosi i dodatni vodeni volumen pa se pojavljuje vertikalna komponenta.
        </div>
        <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 2rem;">
            <div style="background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding: 1rem; position: relative;">
                <div style="position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: #f59e0b; font-size: 0.8rem;">RAVNA PLOHA</div>
                <canvas id="v7-wc-canvas-flat" width="400" height="350" style="width: 100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div style="background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding: 1rem; position: relative;">
                <div style="position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: #3b82f6; font-size: 0.8rem;">ZAKRIVLJENA PLOHA</div>
                <canvas id="v7-wc-canvas-curved" width="400" height="350" style="width: 100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="margin-top: 2rem; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1.5rem; justify-content: center; background: #ffffff; padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
            <div style="min-width: 150px;">
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b;">Dubina h [m]</label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-wc-h-slider" min="0.5" max="5" step="0.1" value="2.0" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div style="min-width: 150px;">
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b;">Visina H [m]</label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-wc-r-slider" min="0.5" max="2" step="0.1" value="1.5" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            
            <table style="width: 100%; margin-top: 1rem; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 0.9rem;">
                <thead>
                    <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #e2e8f0;">
                        <th style="text-align: left; padding: 0.5rem; color: #64748b;">Komponenta</th>
                        <th style="text-align: center; padding: 0.5rem; color: #f59e0b;">Ravna</th>
                        <th style="text-align: center; padding: 0.5rem; color: #3b82f6;">Zakrivljena</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    <tr>
                        <td style="padding: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;">Horizontalna F<sub>H</sub></td>
                        <td id="v7-wc-fh-flat" style="text-align: center; padding: 0.5rem; font-weight: 700;">- kN</td>
                        <td id="v7-wc-fh-curved" style="text-align: center; padding: 0.5rem; font-weight: 700;">- kN</td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <td style="padding: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;">Vertikalna F<sub>V</sub></td>
                        <td style="text-align: center; padding: 0.5rem; color: #94a3b8;">0.00 kN</td>
                        <td id="v7-wc-fv-curved" style="text-align: center; padding: 0.5rem; font-weight: 700;">- kN</td>
                    </tr>
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const cf = document.getElementById('v7-wc-canvas-flat');
    const cc = document.getElementById('v7-wc-canvas-curved');
    const ctxf = cf.getContext('2d');
    const ctxc = cc.getContext('2d');
    const hS = document.getElementById('v7-wc-h-slider');
    const rS = document.getElementById('v7-wc-r-slider');

    function update() {
        const h = parseFloat(hS.value);
        const H = parseFloat(rS.value);
        const rho = 1000, g = 9.81;

        const zc = h + H/2;
        const FH = rho * g * zc * H / 1000;
        const FV = rho * g * (h * H + Math.PI * H * H / 4) / 1000;

        document.getElementById('v7-wc-fh-flat').innerText = FH.toFixed(2) + ' kN';
        document.getElementById('v7-wc-fh-curved').innerText = FH.toFixed(2) + ' kN';
