```{=html}
        document.getElementById('v7-wc-fv-curved').innerText = FV.toFixed(2) + ' kN';

        draw(h, H);
    }

    function draw(h, H) {
        const scale = 50;
        [ctxf, ctxc].forEach((ctx, i) => {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 400, 350);
            const cx = 100, cy = 250;
            const waterY = cy - h * scale;

            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(186, 230, 253, 0.2)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, waterY, 400, 350 - waterY);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#3b82f6'; ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, waterY); ctx.lineTo(400, waterY); ctx.stroke();

            if(i === 0) {
                ctx.strokeStyle = '#f59e0b'; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx, cy); ctx.lineTo(cx, cy - H * scale); ctx.stroke();
                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.2)';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(cx, cy - H * scale);
                ctx.lineTo(cx + (h)*20, cy - H * scale);
                ctx.lineTo(cx + (h+H)*20, cy);
                ctx.lineTo(cx, cy);
                ctx.fill();
            } else {
                ctx.strokeStyle = '#3b82f6'; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(cx, cy - H*scale, H*scale, Math.PI/2, 0, true);
                ctx.stroke();
                for(let a = 0; a <= 90; a += 15) {
                    const rad = a * Math.PI / 180;
                    const x = cx + Math.cos(rad) * H * scale;
                    const y = cy - H*scale + Math.sin(rad) * H * scale;
                    const depth = (y - waterY) / scale;
                    const pLen = depth * 15;
                    drawArrow(ctx, x, y, x + Math.cos(rad)*pLen, y + Math.sin(rad)*pLen, '#3b82f6');
                }
            }
        });
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color) {
        const headlen = 6;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
    }

    hS.oninput = update;
    rS.oninput = update;
    update();
})();
</script>
```

### Widget D: 3D Intuicija (Rotacija cilindra)

Istražite kako se rezultantna sila F<sub>R</sub> rotira i mijenja dok se cilindar postepeno potapa u fluid.

```{=html}
<div id="v7-widget-d-container" class="mf1-widget" style="font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b5cf6, #7c3aed); padding: 1.5rem; color: white;">
        <h3 style="margin: 0; color: white; border: none; background: none; padding: 0; font-size: 1.5rem;">🌀 3D Intuicija: Subverzija</h3>
        <p style="margin: 0.5rem 0 0 0; opacity: 0.9; font-size: 0.9rem;">Dinamička promjena kuta rezultante F<sub>R</sub>.</p>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 0;">
        <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 1.5rem; position: relative; height: 450px;">
            <canvas id="v7-wd-canvas-main" width="400" height="400" style="position: absolute; left: 20px; top: 25px;"></canvas>
            <canvas id="v7-wd-canvas-polar" width="200" height="200" style="position: absolute; right: 20px; bottom: 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;"></canvas>
        </div>

        <div style="padding: 1.5rem; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: #ffffff; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem;">
            <div style="padding: 0.95rem 1rem; background: #f5f3ff; border: 1px solid #ddd6fe; border-radius: 12px; color: #5b21b6; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.5;">
                <strong>Kako čitati widget:</strong> Kako raste uronjeni kut, mijenja se odnos između <code>F_H</code> i <code>F_V</code>, pa se zato zakreće i rezultanta <code>F_R</code>. Polarni prikaz desno sažima samo smjer rezultante.
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Kut potapanja [°]: <span id="v7-wd-angle-val" style="color: #8b5cf6;">180°</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-wd-angle-slider" min="1" max="360" value="180" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem;">
                <button class="v7-wd-preset" data-angle="90" style="padding: 0.5rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #ddd; background: #f9fafb; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.8rem;">Četvrtina (90°)</button>
                <button class="v7-wd-preset" data-angle="180" style="padding: 0.5rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #ddd; background: #f9fafb; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.8rem;">Polovica (180°)</button>
                <button class="v7-wd-preset" data-angle="270" style="padding: 0.5rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #ddd; background: #f9fafb; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.8rem;">Tri četvrtine (270°)</button>
                <button class="v7-wd-preset" data-angle="360" style="padding: 0.5rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #ddd; background: #f9fafb; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.8rem;">Puni krug (360°)</button>
            </div>

            <div style="margin-top: auto; padding: 1rem; background: #f5f3ff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #ddd;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #7c3aed; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 5px;">KUT REZULTANTE α:</div>
                <div id="v7-wd-res-angle" style="font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1e293b;">45.0°</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v7-wd-canvas-main');
    const polar = document.getElementById('v7-wd-canvas-polar');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const pctx = polar.getContext('2d');
    const angleS = document.getElementById('v7-wd-angle-slider');
    
    document.querySelectorAll('.v7-wd-preset').forEach(btn => {
        btn.onclick = () => { angleS.value = btn.dataset.angle; update(); };
    });

    function update() {
        const phi = parseFloat(angleS.value);
        document.getElementById('v7-wd-angle-val').innerText = phi + '°';
        
        const rad = phi * Math.PI / 180;
        const FH = Math.sin(rad/2) * 50;
        const FV = (rad/2 - Math.sin(rad)/2) * 40;
        const alpha = Math.atan2(FV, FH) * 180 / Math.PI;
        
        document.getElementById('v7-wd-res-angle').innerText = alpha.toFixed(1) + '°';
        
        draw(rad, FH, FV);
        drawPolar(alpha);
    }

    function draw(rad, FH, FV) {
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,400,400);
        const cx = 200, cy = 200, R = 100;
        
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1)';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(cx, cy, R, Math.PI/2 - rad/2, Math.PI/2 + rad/2);
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e293b'; ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, R, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke();
        
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#8b5cf6'; ctx.lineWidth = 5;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(cx, cy, R, Math.PI/2 - rad/2, Math.PI/2 + rad/2);
        ctx.stroke();

        const fAngle = Math.atan2(FV, FH);
        drawArrow(ctx, cx, cy, cx + Math.cos(Math.PI/2)*120, cy + Math.sin(Math.PI/2)*120, '#8b5cf6', 'F_R');
    }

    function drawPolar(alpha) {
        pctx.clearRect(0,0,200,200);
        pctx.strokeStyle = '#e2e8f0';
        pctx.beginPath(); pctx.arc(100, 100, 80, 0, Math.PI*2); pctx.stroke();
        pctx.beginPath(); pctx.moveTo(20, 100); pctx.lineTo(180, 100); pctx.stroke();
        pctx.beginPath(); pctx.moveTo(100, 20); pctx.lineTo(100, 180); pctx.stroke();
        
        pctx.strokeStyle = '#8b5cf6'; pctx.lineWidth = 3;
        pctx.beginPath();
        pctx.moveTo(100, 100);
        const r = alpha * Math.PI / 180;
        pctx.lineTo(100 + Math.cos(r)*80, 100 + Math.sin(r)*80);
        pctx.stroke();
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
    }

    angleS.oninput = update;
    update();
})();
</script>
```

### Widget E: Simulator uzgona (Integracija tlaka)

Shvatite uzgon ne samo kao Arhimedov zakon, već kao zbroj svih sila pritiska koje djeluju na tijelo.

```{=html}
<div id="v7-widget-e-container" class="mf1-widget" style="font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #10b981, #059669); padding: 1.5rem; color: white;">
        <h3 style="margin: 0; color: white; border: none; background: none; padding: 0; font-size: 1.5rem;">🎈 Simulator uzgona: Integracija tlaka</h3>
        <p style="margin: 0.5rem 0 0 0; opacity: 0.9; font-size: 0.9rem;">Kako razlika tlaka stvara silu prema gore.</p>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 0;">
        <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 1.5rem; position: relative; min-height: 500px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">
            <canvas id="v7-widget-e-canvas" width="550" height="500" style="max-width: 100%;"></canvas>
        </div>

        <div style="padding: 1.5rem; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: #ffffff; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.25rem;">
            <div style="padding: 0.95rem 1rem; background: #ecfdf5; border: 1px solid #a7f3d0; border-radius: 12px; color: #065f46; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.5;">
                <strong>Fizikalni smisao:</strong> Uzgon nije posebna sila koja se pojavljuje niotkuda, nego razlika između većeg tlaka na dnu i manjeg tlaka na vrhu tijela. Kad uključiš Arhimedov ekvivalent, ta se razlika sažme u jednu rezultantnu silu prema gore.
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Dubina potapanja: <span id="v7-we-h-val" style="color: #059669;">2.0 m</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-we-h-slider" min="1" max="4" step="0.1" value="2.0" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Zaobljenost oblika: <span id="v7-we-r-val" style="color: #059669;">0%</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v7-we-r-slider" min="0" max="100" value="0" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="margin-top: 1rem; padding: 1rem; background: #ecfdf5; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #a7f3d0;">
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
                    <span style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #065f46;">ΣF_gore (plavo):</span>
                    <span id="v7-we-fup" style="font-weight: 700; color: #3b82f6;">12.4 kN</span>
                </div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
                    <span style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #065f46;">ΣF_dolje (crveno):</span>
                    <span id="v7-we-fdown" style="font-weight: 700; color: #ef4444;">8.2 kN</span>
                </div>
                <div style="border-top: 1px solid #a7f3d0; padding-top: 0.5rem; display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                    <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 800; color: #064e3b;">Neto Uzgon:</span>
                    <span id="v7-we-fnet" style="font-weight: 900; color: #10b981;">4.2 kN</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <button id="v7-we-toggle-arch" style="margin-top: auto; padding: 0.75rem; border-radius: 10px; border: 2px dashed #059669; background: transparent; color: #059669; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer;">Prikaži Arhimedov ekvivalent</button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v7-widget-e-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const hS = document.getElementById('v7-we-h-slider');
    const rS = document.getElementById('v7-we-r-slider');
    const archBtn = document.getElementById('v7-we-toggle-arch');

    let showArch = false;
    archBtn.onclick = () => { showArch = !showArch; update(); };

    function update() {
        const h = parseFloat(hS.value);
        const round = parseFloat(rS.value) / 100;
        
        const fup = 10 * h;
        const fdown = 10 * (h - 1);
        const fnet = fup - fdown;

        document.getElementById('v7-we-h-val').innerText = h.toFixed(1) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('v7-we-r-val').innerText = (round*100).toFixed(0) + '%';
        document.getElementById('v7-we-fup').innerText = fup.toFixed(1) + ' kN';
        document.getElementById('v7-we-fdown').innerText = fdown.toFixed(1) + ' kN';
        document.getElementById('v7-we-fnet').innerText = fnet.toFixed(1) + ' kN';

        draw(h, round);
    }

    function draw(h, round) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        const scale = 80;
        const cx = 275, cy = 250;
        const waterY = cy - h * scale;

        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.05)';
        ctx.fillRect(0, waterY, canvas.width, canvas.height - waterY);

        const w = 1.5 * scale, ht = 1.0 * scale;
        const radius = (Math.min(w, ht) / 2) * round;
        
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e293b'; ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.roundRect(cx - w/2, cy - ht/2, w, ht, radius);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc'; ctx.fill(); ctx.stroke();

        if(!showArch) {
            for(let i = -w/2; i <= w/2; i += 20) {
                const dTop = (cy - ht/2 - waterY) / scale;
                drawArrow(ctx, cx + i, cy - ht/2 - dTop*30, cx + i, cy - ht/2, '#ef4444');
                const dBot = (cy + ht/2 - waterY) / scale;
                drawArrow(ctx, cx + i, cy + ht/2 + dBot*30, cx + i, cy + ht/2, '#3b82f6');
            }
        } else {
            drawArrow(ctx, cx, cy + ht, cx, cy - ht, '#10b981', 'F_U = ρgV', 6);
        }
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label, width=2) {
        const headlen = 8;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
        if(label) { ctx.font = "bold 14px Inter"; ctx.fillText(label, x1 + 10, y1); }
    }

    hS.oninput = update;
    rS.oninput = update;
    update();
})();
</script>
```
